name: agenticmastermind-marketplace
description: Required dependencies for the Agentic Mastermind marketplace

core.name: node
core.description: JavaScript runtime — required for npm and gws CLI

install.macos: brew install node || curl -o- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.40.3/install.sh | bash && nvm install --lts

core.name: npm
core.description: Node package manager — bundled with Node.js

core.name: git
core.description: Version control — required for sync script and marketplace distribution

install.linux: sudo apt install git || sudo dnf install git

core.name: gh
core.description: GitHub CLI — required for creating and managing the private marketplace repo

install.linux: sudo apt install gh || sudo dnf install gh

core.name: jq
core.description: JSON processor — required by the sync script

install.linux: sudo apt install jq || sudo dnf install jq

google-workspace.name: gws
google-workspace.description: Google Workspace CLI — the engine behind all gws-* skills
